properties.name: High-loyalty UK (≥3 orders/yr)
properties.definition: UK customers who placed 3+ orders in the trailing 12 months, AOV ≥ £100

properties.name: Lapsed UK (no purchase 90+ days)
properties.definition: UK customers active in the last 18 months but with no purchase in the past 90 days

properties.name: High-loyalty US (≥3 orders/yr)
properties.definition: US customers who placed 3+ orders in the trailing 12 months, AOV ≥ $130

properties.name: Retinoid heroes US
properties.definition: US customers who have purchased Retinoid PM Serum at least twice

properties.name: Sensitive-skin DE (Gentle Gemma proxy)
properties.definition: DE customers whose first purchase was Ceramide Repair Cream or Clearing Cleanser

properties.name: Ritual-set buyers FR
properties.definition: FR customers who purchased The Ritual Set as their first order

properties.name: LINE loyalty JP
properties.definition: JP customers who opted into the LINE loyalty programme and have placed ≥2 orders

properties.name: Xiaohongshu-discovered CN
properties.definition: CN cross-border customers whose first session was attributed to Xiaohongshu UGC

properties.name: Gift buyers Q4 (global)
properties.definition: Global customers who purchased a gift set in Q4 of any year

properties.name: Science readers — global (Sven proxy)
properties.definition: Global subscribers who have downloaded ≥2 white-papers from the science hub

properties.name: High-AOV prestige buyers
properties.definition: Customers whose trailing-12-month AOV exceeds £180 (or local equivalent)

properties.name: Dermatologist co-signed acquisition
properties.definition: Customers whose first session was attributed to a dermatologist-creator referral
